creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 163795
new port & update (ok for 10.1preR)

Difference with the previous attachment 163352:

At multimedia/qmmp/Makefile, add missing dependency on Qt5X11Extras
as USE_QT5+= x11extras.
At multimedia/qmmp/Makefile and multimedia/qmmp-qt4/Makefile, replace
OPTIONS_MULTI with OPTIONS_GROUP to allow to disable all options as
the original product does.
